author: monitorbot
text: ⚠️ ALERT: ROUTE_SOLVER timeout (>30s) on dispatch-prod. 2 consecutive failures. Runbook: wiki/route-solver

author: priya
text: ugh what now. looking

author: priya
text: route solver is timing out on prod. probably just a blip, the nightly batch is heavy

author: monitorbot
text: ⚠️ ALERT: ROUTE_SOLVER timeout (>30s) on dispatch-prod. 5 consecutive failures.

author: priya
text: ok not a blip. 5 in a row. tailing the logs now

author: priya
text: seeing `ECONNREFUSED osrm:5000` all over the solver logs. so it can't reach the routing engine at all

author: priya
text: gonna try just restarting the solver pod, classic turn-it-off-and-on

author: priya
text: restarted. it came back up. alerts stopped. crossing fingers

author: monitorbot
text: ✅ RECOVERED: ROUTE_SOLVER responding normally on dispatch-prod.

author: priya
text: ok phew. going to grab water

author: monitorbot
text: ⚠️ ALERT: ROUTE_SOLVER timeout (>30s) on dispatch-prod. 3 consecutive failures.

author: priya
text: you have GOT to be kidding me

author: priya
text: same ECONNREFUSED. so the restart didnt actually fix anything, it just delayed it. osrm itself must be unhealthy

author: priya
text: checked the osrm container. it IS running but its throwing `map data not loaded` on every request. so it's up but useless

author: priya
text: @marcus you around? getting weird routing failures on prod, could use a second set of eyes

author: monitorbot
text: ⚠️ ALERT: ROUTE_SOLVER timeout (>30s) on dispatch-prod. 9 consecutive failures.

author: priya
text: marcus is asleep, of course. it's almost midnight. ok. i'm on my own with this one

author: priya
text: ok think priya. map data not loaded. that means the osrm graph files are missing or the wrong version. what changed

author: priya
text: going through the deploy history. there was a deploy tonight at 22:40. `routing-config v2.3.0`. that's LITERALLY when the first alert fired

author: priya
text: 22:40 deploy, 22:40 first timeout. that's not a coincidence. someone shipped a routing config change right before the biggest night of the quarter

author: priya
text: the v2.3.0 diff points osrm at a new map data path `/data/graph-2024q3/` but that directory doesn't exist on the prod volume. it was never uploaded. so osrm boots, finds no map, serves garbage

author: priya
text: ok so the fix is either upload the graph files (30gb, at midnight, on this wifi, lol no) or roll the config back to v2.2.4

author: priya
text: rolling back to routing-config v2.2.4. this SHOULD point osrm back at the old graph that actually exists

author: monitorbot
text: ⚠️ ALERT: ROUTE_SOLVER timeout (>30s) on dispatch-prod. 14 consecutive failures.

author: priya
text: rollback deployed. waiting for the pods to cycle. come on

author: priya
text: still timing out. WHY. the config rolled back but osrm is still holding the bad map path in memory. i think i have to hard restart osrm too, not just the solver

author: priya
text: restarting osrm with the reverted config now. if this doesn't work i genuinely don't know what's next

author: monitorbot
text: ⚠️ ALERT: ROUTE_SOLVER timeout (>30s) on dispatch-prod. 19 consecutive failures.

author: priya
text: osrm came up. it's loading the old graph. i can see `map data loaded: 4.2M edges` in the logs. that's the first good log line all night

author: priya
text: sending a test route request... it returned a route!! 8 stops, 22 minutes. IT WORKS

author: monitorbot
text: ✅ RECOVERED: ROUTE_SOLVER responding normally on dispatch-prod.

author: priya
text: ok. ok. it's holding. no timeouts for a few min now

author: priya
text: i want to say it's fixed but i've been burned twice tonight already. going to watch it for a bit before i trust it

author: priya
text: still green. 19 min clean. i think the rollback actually held this time

author: priya
text: the thing that scares me is this was a config that got merged and deployed with nobody watching. if routing's still down at 6am we can't dispatch the 2,300 meals tomorrow. people are counting on those

author: priya
text: i should write all this down for whoever comes on in the morning so they don't have to reverse-engineer my brain at 6am

author: priya
text: root cause: routing-config v2.3.0 (deployed 22:40) pointed osrm at /data/graph-2024q3/ which was never uploaded. fix: rolled back to v2.2.4 + hard restart of osrm. do NOT re-deploy v2.3.0 until the graph files are actually on the prod volume

author: priya
text: it's almost 2am. i've been staring at this since before 11. my eyes hurt and i keep re-reading the same log line

author: priya
text: marcus if you see this when you wake up — it's stable, don't touch the routing config, full writeup above. i just need to close my laptop

author: priya
text: 1:47am. still the only one here. i'll stay up a little longer just to be sure it holds
